headline: 影视新片热潮来袭，《痴迷》强势登顶
headlineEn: New Film Frenzy Hits, 'Obsession' Tops the Charts
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：无新片上映，本周《痴迷》《末日地堡》领跑热搜，《福尔摩斯小姐3》等受关注，未来多部大片待映。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but 'Obsession' and 'Silo' trend this week; 'Enola Holmes 3' buzzes; upcoming blockbusters await.

industryHighlights.text: 本周无新片上映，市场热度集中于话题大作
industryHighlights.en: No new films this week, buzz centers on trending titles

industryHighlights.text: 《玩具总动员5》等续集引发期待
未来《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》等大片蓄势待发
industryHighlights.en: Upcoming 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' poised for release
